meaning: n.(木板等的)槽口,榫头,槽口接缝处vt.开槽口于,嵌接vi.嵌接,榫接
examples: Mechanical tooling for wood. Cutters for rabbet. Dimensions.
Front and back good glasses, rabbet joint moving system, easy cleaning.
